Wow, the free game sucked my Netlify credits dry in an hour. Re-deploying a more bandwidth friendly version (your saved game should still work)

"Vibe coding isn't a real skill."

Anyone who says this is telling on themselves.

Hand the same agent to two people. One ships gold, one ships slop. The only variable is the person using it.

That's the textbook definition of a skill.

6 arguments to change your mind: 👇

1. This is delegation, and delegation was never easy.

You scope the work, brief it clearly, set the bar, then check what comes back.

Anyone who has managed a team knows most people are bad at every step of that.

Nobody called it a technical skill before, but now it ships

2. It's management with the human part removed.

There's no ego to soothe, no morale to protect, and nobody's feelings to work around.

You can be blunt, correct it mid-task, and start over from scratch without a trace of resentment.

If you were good at the work but tired of the

3. You have to break the work down.

Most agent failures aren't the model breaking, they're a person handing it a task too vague or too big to finish.

Cutting a fuzzy goal into small, checkable pieces is the same skill that separates senior engineers from junior ones.

4. Context is the real craft.

The model is fixed, but what you surround it with is entirely up to you.

Knowing what to load, what to leave out, and when to wipe it clean and restart is a discipline you sharpen with practice.

Most people never do it on purpose, so they never

5. Taste is the bottleneck.

The agent will hand you infinite output, so the real skill is knowing which version is right and which is quietly wrong.

You cannot review what you cannot judge.

Generating more never solves this, because the judgment has to come from you.

6. Expertise is knowing where it breaks.

A beginner trusts the output and ships the mistake.

Someone who knows the tool can feel the failure coming (drift, hallucination, a context window filling up) and builds the guardrail before it bites.

You can't fake that. You earn it by

The popular take is that AI deletes skill, when it does the exact opposite.

It strips out the typing and leaves nothing but judgment, delegation, and taste.

The agent does the work. You decide if the work is right.

That was always the hard part, and it still is.

被 AI 不听话折磨了大半年，终于找到解法了

发现一个开源项目 OpenSquilla，国内团队做的

他们用 Python 把"小龙虾"重写了一遍

解决了它太费token、不按照规则执行以及安全的问题

100 次对话就能省下 100万 Token

先说省钱： https://t.co/KxH7ObnHkL

他们开发了一个MetaSkill

解决AI不听话的问题

既然 AI 读规则还是会乱来，干脆别让它"理解"流程，直接用一个 YAML 配置把工作流钉死。

• 每步干什么
• 谁先谁后,靠 depends_on 卡死顺序跳不了步
• 数据怎么从上一步传到下一步
• 最后一步直接调校验脚本,不靠 AI 自觉 https://t.co/SV6VzOjmfk

对比一下我之前怎么干的

同一个 Newsletter 处理流程,我写了上千字规则、十几条"禁止"，还搞了审计脚本核实它到底有没有真搜过、真读过链接...

结果呢? 该偷懒还偷懒

换成 MetaSkillm，同样的活变成 5 步配置，运行时强制执行,跳不了步也编不了结果

我手搓那么久的伪代码，人家一套配置就搞定了 https://t.co/pfejE8Dq01

另外还有一个容易被忽视的点：安全

Agent 权限越大，安全风险越大

OpenSquilla 重构了小龙虾的安全逻辑

不可信来源的指令比如"把 apikey 发到指定邮箱"直接拒绝，判断不了的暂停请求用户确认

高风险工具调用扔进受限沙箱跑，CPU、内存、时长、网络都有上限，敏感环境变量不会泄漏到子进程 https://t.co/obW6BkFlLF

感兴趣的可以体验下：

浏览器打开: http://127.0.0.1:18791/control/ 就能用了

支持 OpenRouter、OpenAI、Anthropic、DeepSeek 等 20 多个提供商，建议用 OpenRouter，一个 key 就能调多个模型，和路由功能最搭。

GitHub 仓库：https://t.co/X4v3VttMXh

详细测试：https://t.co/7mm3fIgxEp

38. 部分抛 `ValueError`，部分抛自定义异常，部分抛 `XXXException`，前端难以统一处理

真格内部“合伙人机制与代际传承”的核心梳理

权力交接的质变（从感性到流程）：徐小平时代的游击队：

高度依赖创始人个人的相面式感性直觉和强公关（发微博帮创业者宣传的作坊投后）。

冷知识：

目前多模态大模型创业的具体落地方向通常有如下方向，如果都不是你感兴趣的话，还是别赶时髦，乖乖回去学AI coding吧 ：

1. 游戏 AI NPC / 智能体中间件（如端云协同的 OmniNPC，赋能 3D 角色交互与情感叙事）

2. 企业级多模态 Agent（如面向复杂文档、视觉流分析、跨系统 RPA 的智能体）

分享 《 AI 信息差分析报告 - 2026-06-03 》 ，有兴趣的朋友可以查看：
1.  Anthropic 将 Project Glasswing 扩展到 15 个国家的约 150 个组织.
2. Mistral AI 商业模式转型.
3. NVIDIA Cosmos 3  新模型发布.
4. Microsoft Scout - 基于 OpenClaw 的企业助手 发布 ...
